name: report_pipeline_analysis
short_description: Perform pipeline register insertion analysis and display report.
full_help:
report_pipeline_analysis

Description: 
Perform pipeline register insertion analysis and display report.

Syntax: 
report_pipeline_analysis  [-cells <args>] [-verbose] [-clocks <args>]
                          [-file <arg>] [-include_paths_to_pipeline] [-append]
                          [-max_added_latency <arg>] [-report_loops]
                          [-return_string] [-quiet]

Usage: 
  Name                          Description
  -----------------------------------------
  [-cells]                      Analyze each of the specified hierarchical 
                                cells separately and ignore feedback loops 
                                external to the cells.
  [-verbose]                    Suspend message limits during command 
                                execution
  [-clocks]                     Filter report output to show only the 
                                specified clocks
  [-file]                       Filename to output results to. (send output 
                                to console if -file is not used)
  [-include_paths_to_pipeline]  Report paths to cut. (only available if -file
                                is used)
  [-append]                     Append to existing file
  [-max_added_latency]          Maximum extra latency that can be inserted 
                                into the system (0 = unlimited).
                                Default: 100
  [-report_loops]               Report loop information as well
  [-return_string]              Return report as string
  [-quiet]                      Ignore command errors

Categories: 
Tools, Tcl
